Software Engineer.description: Design, develop and maintain software systems for products and platforms.
roadmap: Contribute to open source on GitHub
Prepare for aptitude and coding rounds

Full Stack Developer.description: Build complete web applications handling both frontend and backend.
roadmap: Learn React.js or Vue.js for frontend
Master SQL and one NoSQL database
Study Git, Docker, and CI/CD basics

Data Analyst.description: Analyze datasets to provide business insights and drive decisions.
roadmap: Learn SQL thoroughly (joins, subqueries, window functions)
Learn Python with Pandas and NumPy
Build proficiency in Tableau or Power BI
Complete 2 analytics projects with real datasets

Data Scientist.description: Build ML models and extract insights from large datasets.
roadmap: Study Statistics, Probability and Linear Algebra
Learn Scikit-learn for classical ML algorithms
Deep dive into Deep Learning (TensorFlow or PyTorch)
Learn feature engineering and model deployment

Design Engineer.description: Design mechanical components and systems using CAD tools.
roadmap: Master SolidWorks or CATIA for 3D modeling

Site Engineer.description: Oversee construction activities and ensure quality and safety on site.
roadmap: Learn STAAD Pro for structural analysis
Study concrete technology and mix design
Learn project management with MS Project or Primavera
Complete site internship for practical experience
